title: ranunculus rectiangulus
intro: Ranunculus rectiangulus, also known as the sharp-leaved buttercup, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Ranunculus rectiangulus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be dried and used to make infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, although its use should be carefully considered due to potential toxicity.
